name: Jira source (example)
author: Symphony
description: Issue-source plugin for Jira Cloud: pulls issues as Symphony tasks via a JQL fallback chain, and on completion comments + transitions the issue to a Done-category state. Reads its token + siteUrl + email from <install-dir>/config.json. Repackages the in-tree Jira connector via the @symphony/plugin-sdk provides.issueSource contract — fetch_open_issues + write_back_status, wrapped host-side into the same ingest + writeback pipeline (sync_jira).
